name: ai-project-control
description: Project Control Gateway plugin for routing AI Development System project operations through controlled CLI commands.

interface.shortDescription: Route project plans, tasks, prompts, and system evolution through controlled CLI gateways.
interface.longDescription: AI Project Control packages the Project Control Gateway skill for Codex. It directs plan work through planctl.py, task/current/prompt work through taskctl.py, and AI Development System evolution through evolutionctl.py while preserving protected AI_PROJECT/state/**, AI_PROJECT/events/**, and AI_PROJECT/generated/** boundaries.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Project Control Gateway for this repository task.
